nasb.text: When a man offers a sacrifice of peace offerings to the Lord to fulfill a special vow or for a freewill offering, of the herd or of the flock, it must be perfect to be accepted; there shall be no defect in it.

esv.text: And when anyone offers a sacrifice of peace offerings to the Lord  to fulfill a vow or as a freewill offering from the herd or from the flock, to be accepted it must be perfect; there shall be no blemish in it.

cnv.text: 人若是為了還願，或是甘心把牛羊獻給耶和華作平安祭，總要獻上一隻完全、沒有任何瑕疵的祭物，才蒙悅納。

ccb.text: 如果有人为了还愿或自愿献牛羊作平安祭，必须献毫无残疾的牛羊才能蒙悦纳。
